{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314273617D615D2FB7323637C54"}"},"total":433},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490825898211066648","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"肚子疼写的不错，挺好。不过几个BOSS一点都没有压迫感，哪怕最终BOSS。反倒是那位校长第一次出手秒杀日本七阶那次压迫感满满。让人难忘。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744100129,"group_id":"7361822343829654552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1WTCNXT78+q336JXEfG/xSY+/T2TSuNoTjp08ZXFAmO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1720054743054317","user_name":"天魂曲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1720054743054317","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361822343829654552","book_info":{"abstract":"【细菌变异+养成+慢热+利己主义+非正派+无敌流】
   灵气复苏，万兽进化！
   人类为抵抗兽潮，死伤惨重。
   从此，人类开始利用其体内所蕴含的灵力， 化为「气血」与「异能」两种力量。
————
     武道大兴！
     武者的时代来临！
   而拥有S级【异能】御兽，但【气血】却只有3卡的废物莫辞，却因机缘巧合重生回到了高三。
   为了重新踏上武者之路。
   他选择与不受灵力滋补，无法获得进化的【细菌】签订契约！
   本源御兽变异！
   蝴蝶效应展开！
   陨落的武道天才，从此开始变异和进化出各式各样的细菌！
   蚕食肉身的腐蚀菌、服气餐霞的血合菌、操控万物的寄灵菌......
   ......
   
   蓝星一众强者，正在开会中......
   莫辞：“我理应获得更......！不对，是我们龙国理应获得更多的资源！不多不少，就百分之70吧！我话说到这，谁赞成？谁反对？”
   东瀛国强者： “我反对！”
   啪——！！！
   莫辞反手一巴掌扇了过去！
   各国强者：   “我赞成！我赞成！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocf1e2ea3fe0c270830992d00a7dcf1aa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"火暴兽","author_id":"","book_id":"7361822343829654552","book_name":"不是哥们？S级御兽你契约细菌？","book_short_name":"御菌之主","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203050","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6977人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7384304958159454744","read_count":"6977","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1034673"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"459","tags":"都市高武,都市,重生,天才,无敌,灵气复苏,都市异能,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c20524871165769dad14c6932fe3adbd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431256&x-signature=8cQSx2E6nOKrsZNCnyM%2Ffn4T8So%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111073115408","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","nove
